summary: Full end-to-end testing of EduBot backend (Claude via Emergent LLM key) and frontend flows (Login + role-based UI, Groups tabs/modal, Events filters/principal-only create, AI Chat with real LLM, theme toggle, branding). All critical paths working. 5/5 backend tests pass, all frontend flows verified.

design_issues.screen: All Dialog modals (Create Group, Create Event)
issues: Radix Dialog accessibility warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Cosmetic React console warning; consider adding DialogDescription for a11y compliance.

action_items: (Optional/A11y) Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to Create Group and Create Event dialogs to remove Radix warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is defined AFTER the chat_edubot endpoint references it (line 109 logger.error uses logger configured on line 136). Works at runtime due to Python late binding inside function, but it's poor ordering - move logger init above route definitions.

EduBot endpoint stores every chat message in MongoDB (db.edubot_messages) but there is no GET endpoint to retrieve chat history, no cleanup, and no auth - any anonymous user can spam the LLM via session_id. Consider adding rate limiting and auth.
Login.jsx: handleDemoClick only console.logs - if this was intentional per spec, OK. But UX-wise, demo buttons that do nothing visible may confuse users; consider auto-filling email field instead.
authStore: token is a fake string ('mock-jwt-...') stored in localStorage; clearly noted as mock, fine for this iteration.
test_credentials: Mock frontend auth: principal@usfuturee.com / any password (Principal role), student@usfuturee.com / any password (Student role).
seed_data_creation: None - all data is mock/frontend-only except EduBot messages which are persisted to MongoDB via the endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has only POST /api/chat/edubot as real integration (Claude via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) plus base /api/status endpoints. All auth/groups/events/profile data is mock from /app/frontend/src/utils/mockData.js. Principal role is gated via DEMO_ACCOUNTS email match in authStore (principal@usfuturee.com -> principal). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_edubot.py - reuse for regression.
verified_flows: POST /api/chat/edubot returns real Claude reply (5/5 pytest)
Empty message returns 400, missing field returns 422
Demo buttons on /login do NOT navigate (only console.log)
Groups: posts/yours/discover tabs all switch, join toggles to 'Joined', category pills filter, create-group modal submits with success toast
Events: search filters list (shows no-events for nonsense), upcoming/past tabs work, create-event modal opens
AI Chat: 8 suggested questions, clicking suggested-q-0 returns real Claude reply, custom message works, thumbs up/down toggle, clear chat resets to single welcome message
Branding: 'Usfuturee' appears (3x on login), 'EduConnect' nowhere (0 occurrences)
